goal: issues/ を優先度順に実装
summary: Wave 1 open issues: LSP stdio (#634), playground typecheck (#500/#472), hygiene script (#418), host gating (#137)
acceptanceCriteria: Wave 1 issues implemented or documented blockers in handoffs
Issue indexes regenerated when issue files change

tasks.name: implement-634-lsp-stdio
tasks.scopedGoal: Close #634: wire stdio JSON-RPC for `arukellt lsp` and `arukellt debug-adapter` with no script argument. Read `.orchestrate/open-issues-impl/bootstrap-context.md` and `issues/open/634-selfhost-lsp-dap-stdio-transport-entrypoint.md`. Follow `.agents/impl-selfhost/SKILL.md` and acceptance-slice-implementer scope. Primary paths: `src/compiler/main/editor.ark`, `dispatch.ark`, `lsp.ark`, `dap.ark`. Stdio framed protocol on stdin/stdout; stderr for logs only. Keep script-replay path for lifecycle goldens if needed. Update issue acceptance checkboxes when met; move to issues/done/ only if fully closed. Regenerate issue index if status changes.
acceptance: Bare `arukellt lsp` reads/writes framed JSON-RPC on stdin/stdout
Bare `arukellt debug-adapter` reads/writes framed DAP on stdin
tasks.verify: python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick && python3 scripts/check/check-lsp-lifecycle.py && python3 scripts/check/check-dap-lifecycle.py

tasks.name: implement-500-472-playground-typecheck
tasks.scopedGoal: Close #500 then #472: real typecheck in playground (not parse-only shim). Read bootstrap-context.md and issues #500/#472. Follow `.agents/impl-playground/SKILL.md`. Do NOT recreate `crates/ark-playground-wasm`; use selfhost compiler wasm / CLI check path (see `playground/src/compiler-host.ts`). `typecheckSource()` must emit type-phase diagnostics; satisfy `playground/src/tests/typecheck-close-gate.test.ts`. Wire playground.ts/worker.ts if needed. Update issue files and regenerate index on close.
acceptance: typecheck returns type-phase diagnostics for type errors
tasks.verify: cd playground && npm test 2>/dev/null || node --test src/tests/typecheck-close-gate.test.ts && python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick

tasks.name: implement-418-orphan-inventory
tasks.scopedGoal: Close #418: add orphan/stale file inventory script per `issues/open/418-hygiene-orphan-stale-file-inventory.md`. Read bootstrap-context.md. Follow `.agents/impl-cli/SKILL.md`. Add `scripts/check/check-orphan-inventory.sh` (or Python gate registered in manager.py) scanning docs/tests/benchmarks/artifacts per acceptance. Advisory exit 0. Register in verify quick if issue requires. Update issue + regenerate index.
acceptance: Inventory script exists and scans required categories
Callable from CI or documented verify path

tasks.name: implement-137-host-gating
tasks.scopedGoal: Close #137: implement selfhost resolver target-gated rejection for T3-only `std::host::*` modules (e.g. sockets/udp on T1). Read bootstrap-context.md and `issues/open/137-std-wasi-namespace-and-target-gating.md`. Follow `.agents/impl-stdlib/SKILL.md` + impl-selfhost for resolver. Implement in `src/compiler/resolver/` (not deleted crates/). Satisfy `tests/fixtures/target_gating/` fixtures (E0500). Regenerate docs/index if manifest changes.
acceptance: T1 import of T3-only host modules emits E0500 (or issue-specified code)
target_gating fixtures pass under selfhost harness

tasks.name: verify-wave1
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify wave 1: read worker handoffs; confirm #634/#500/#472/#418/#137 acceptance criteria met or blockers documented; run `python3 scripts/manager.py verify quick`; confirm issue index synced if issues moved.
